rows.label: tev061101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Kaka about the Nopon caravans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Kaka about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Kaka about the Navigation Ball.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Kaka about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Kaka about secret treasure in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Kaka about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Friend can find Nopon
caravans all over Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Closest one is in Menisuna
Valley. That is place friends
call "Valley of Oblivion."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Has friend been there? It
is nice caravan, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, leader there is really
greedy. Mo-mo! Might try to
take poor friend to cleaners.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0008
rows.name:
What relief to hear
little Tatsu is safe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yes, Tatsu always stuffing face and
bragging and acting pretentious—but as
big crybabies go, Tatsu not really so bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Tatsu has finest coat of all the littlepon,
so maybe friend can ruffle fur of Tatsu
whenever friend needs cheering up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Anyway, please take good care
of our little pain-in-butt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ah, so friend is using our
secret Nopon treasure?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Navigation Ball is very useful! Just
imagine where friend want to go, and
fwoom! Ball flies off in that direction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Mo? Sometimes Navigation Ball
go in circles or get lost?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well, nothing is perfect. Navigation
Ball really not much more clever
than Tatsu in the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Try to look past failings
and give it lots of love.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0026
rows.name:
When friendship treaty was signed, Elder
Nan—who had been traveling around Mira—got
crazy idea that all Nopon should move to NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Caravan leaders like Kaka not about
to pack up and leave, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Caravans are important commercial
centers, as well as safe haven
for traveling Nopon merchants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0029
rows.name:
If caravans pack up and go, merchants
perilous journey get even perilouser!
No, caravans must stay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Deep in Nightglow Forest cave, Kaka
once stumble upon statues of two
giants that were strangely familiar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0031
rows.name:
When Kaka tell Collepedian
friend about it, excitement
was impossible to contain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Collepedian start jumping up
and down and saying, "That one
of missing collectibles!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0033
rows.name:
If friend also looking for these
statues, then friend should check
corners of caves veeeery carefully.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Elder Nan is very spoiled, but despite
complaints, Nopon love him all the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0035
rows.name:
If Tatsu hope to become next caravan
leader, Tatsu should watch Elder
Nan like hawk with glasses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0036
rows.name:
...And then do exact
opposite of Elder Nan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061101_MSG0037
rows.name:
All Nopon really want is for Tatsu to be self.
Time in human city will give Tatsu all the
knowledge he need to become good leader.[ST:wait ]
